text:
Once upon a time, in a vibrant town bustling with life, a peculiar fox decided to start a bakery. Every morning, feathers of every color could be heard rustling from the pies being baked inside the cozy nook where our hero sat.

The fox named Wilbert had heard tales of a mysterious magical pie that could turn anything it touched into a delightful feast. He dreamed of offering his pies to all the animals in the forest. One particular pie, a berry pie filled with twinkling stars, seemed to shine quite magically.

One rainy afternoon, Wilbert handed out his delightful pies to various creatures. A cheerful owl got a pie filled with nightingale songs. A curious rabbit tasted one that seemed to whistle back. Even a small squirrel couldnbonnet got a pie that sparkled like the sun.

Later that evening as twilight painted the sky with shades of gold, Wilbert listened to a squirrel that told him about a wise old owl that could turn anything you wished for into reality.
